metric_caveats: This diagnostic cap tests the combined S2 clean-ladder stack before full validation; it is not a published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
The variant combines I0 ECG investigation removal, C0/C1 comorbidity surface bridges, and the S5 non-ASM/brand annotated-medication guard.
No scorer semantics change; all changes are post-prediction benchmark-facing bridges or guards.
Report per-family F1 and monitor diagnosis, seizure_type, investigation, comorbidity, and annotated_medication separately.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are schema/gate signals only; full validation remains the comparison anchor.
